evidence: Merged to main (db4fa111) and rebuilt. Deterministic gate green: npm run build + npm run check (349 files clean) + npm test exit 0 (roadmap-plan 45/45, including the added FGAP-133 regression). Runtime demo: loadRoadmap on the live substrate reports MILE-005 status 'planned', PHASE-M5-WRITE-INTEGRITY status 'in-progress', taskProgress.bucket 'complete', and no `rollup` field — completeness (status) is decoupled from task-progress, so the false 'complete' verdict cannot arise. Fresh adversarial audit found no residual completeness-off-progress path, no missed rename, scripts type-checked, HTML consumer dry-run clean, docs coherent.

criteria_results.criterion: Roadmap completeness verdict computed via derivedRollupComplete (status), not rollupPhaseStatus; a phase whose authored status is not complete never reads complete regardless of positioned-task coverage.
criteria_results.evidence: loadRoadmap sets milestone status from currentState (derivedRollupComplete-backed) and phase status from the authored field; runtime demo shows MILE-005 planned / PHASE-M5 in-progress while taskProgress.bucket is complete.

criteria_results.criterion: rollupPhaseStatus output labeled task-progress only; no consumer/renderer treats it as a completeness/reached verdict; no code path derives a completeness verdict from it.
criteria_results.evidence: Field renamed rollup->taskProgress on MilestoneView/PhaseRollupView; renderRoadmap '**Task progress:**'; validateRoadmap warning reworded as data-quality; build-html-views label 'task progress'. Adversarial audit confirmed no completeness verdict derives from taskProgress.

criteria_results.criterion: No membership inferred from phase intent prose; scope reads only from task_positioned_in_phase edges.
criteria_results.evidence: rollupPhaseStatus and its membership scope unchanged; no intent-parsing added (confirmed by diff + audit).

criteria_results.criterion: Runtime demo: context-roadmap-load reports PHASE-M5/MILE-005 not-complete with no bucket 'complete' contradicting status 'planned'.
criteria_results.evidence: loadRoadmap('.') demo output: MILE-005 status planned, taskProgress.bucket complete, no rollup field; assertion 'task-progress reads complete while status is not' true.

criteria_results.criterion: npm run build + check + test green; roadmap-plan.ts tests assert single-sourced completeness and the labeled progress-only display.
criteria_results.evidence: build/check/test exit 0; roadmap-plan.test.ts renames to taskProgress, renderRoadmap regex asserts '**Task progress:**', and a new regression test decouples status from taskProgress.
